channel.title: Noontime Sun and D on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Noontime Sun and D on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Sunlight and UVB provide a few more health benefits than Vitamin D (Nitric Oxide, etc.) – Weller
item.description:
• Sunlight: Time for a Rethink?
      • VitaminDWiki – Nitric oxide (from sun, Mg, Vit D, etc) reduces some health problems - many studies.

Sunlight: Time for a Rethink?

Review J Invest Dermatol . 2024 Apr 24:S0022-202X(24)00280-X. doi: 10.1016/j.jid.2023.12.027

Richard B Weller 1

UVR is a skin carcinogen, yet no studies link sun exposure to increased all-cause mortality. Epidemiological studies from the United Kingdom and Sweden link sun exposure with reduced all-cause, cardiovascular, and cancer mortality. Vitamin D synthesis is dependent on UVB exposure. Individuals with higher serum levels of vitamin D are healthier in many ways, yet multiple trials of oral vitamin D supplementation show little benefit. Growing evidence shows that sunlight has health benefits through vitamin D-independent pathways, such as photomobilization of nitric oxide from cutaneous stores with reduction in cardiovascular morbidity. Sunlight has important systemic health benefit as well as risks.

item.title: Fewer COVID deaths in countries with more sunshine
item.description:
Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki

Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year

Markdown:
--------
 **[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf" style="margin-right: 0.3em;"></i>Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki ](/attachments/d3.mock.pdf)** 

---

##### Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year


AST Structure:
-------------
├── FontNode
│   full_match: `{FONT(size="17")}__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__{FONT}`
│   inner_content: `__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: size="17"
│   │   size: 17
│   children:
│   ├── BoldNode
│   │   full_match: `__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__`
│   │   inner_content: `{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}`
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── AttachNode
│   │   │   full_match: `{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}`
│   │   │   inner_content: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `
│   │   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   │   raw_content: (inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")
│   │   │   │   inline: 1
│   │   │   │   id: 21124
│   │   │   │   icon: 1
│   │   │   children:
│   │   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   │   full_match: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `
│   │   │   │   inner_content: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!!Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year`
│   inner_content: `Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year`
│   level: `5`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year`
│   │   inner_content: `Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year`├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!VitaminDWiki -  {SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT catObjectId, COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE categId = 10  OR categId = 155 GROUP BY catObjectId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS categs INNER JOIN tiki_objects ON tiki_objects.objectId = categs.catObjectId WHERE type = "wiki page"{SQL}       studies in both categories UV and Virus`
│   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki -  {SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT catObjectId, COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE categId = 10  OR categId = 155 GROUP BY catObjectId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS categs INNER JOIN tiki_objects ON tiki_objects.objectId = categs.catObjectId WHERE type = "wiki page"{SQL}       studies in both categories UV and Virus`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `VitaminDWiki -  `
│   │   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki -  `
│   ├── SqlNode
│   │   full_match: `{SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT catObjectId, COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE categId = 10  OR categId = 155 GROUP BY catObjectId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS categs INNER JOIN tiki_objects ON tiki_objects.objectId = categs.catObjectId WHERE type = "wiki page"{SQL}`
│   │   inner_content: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT catObjectId, COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE categId = 10  OR categId = 155 GROUP BY catObjectId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS categs INNER JOIN tiki_objects ON tiki_objects.objectId = categs.catObjectId WHERE type = "wiki page"`
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content: db=>vitamind
│   │   │   db: >vitamind
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `       studies in both categories UV and Virus`
│   │   inner_content: `       studies in both categories UV and Virus`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── EmphasisNode
│   full_match: `''This list is automatically updated''`
│   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `This list is automatically updated`
│   │   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── CategoryNode
│   full_match: `{category id="10+155" types="wiki" sort="created_desc" split="n" and="y" sub="n"- showdescription="n" showname="y" showtype="n" one="y" showTitle="n"}`
│   inner_content: ``
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: id="10+155" types="wiki" sort="created_desc" split="n" and="y" sub="n"- showdescription="n" showname="y" showtype="n" one="y" showTitle="n"
│   │   id: 10+155
│   │   types: wiki
│   │   sort: created_desc
│   │   split: n
│   │   and: y
│   │   sub: n
│   │   showdescription: n
│   │   showname: y
│   │   showtype: n
│   │   one: y
│   │   showTitle: n├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`

Original Tiki:
-------------
{FONT(size="17")}__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21124" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__{FONT}
---
!!!!!Note: Tropics probably have 3X hours per day to get UVB as well as 3X more days per year
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki -  {SQL(db=>vitamind)}SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT catObjectId, COUNT(*) FROM `tiki_category_objects` WHERE categId = 10  OR categId = 155 GROUP BY catObjectId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS categs INNER JOIN tiki_objects ON tiki_objects.objectId = categs.catObjectId WHERE type = "wiki page"{SQL}       studies in both categories UV and Virus
''This list is automatically updated''
{category id="10+155" types="wiki" sort="created_desc" split="n" and="y" sub="n"- showdescription="n" showname="y" showtype="n" one="y" showTitle="n"}

item.title: Dermatology's Disastrous War Against The Sun
item.description:
• Article by A MidWesternDoctor.com

Article by A MidWesternDoctor.com

APR 21, 2024

Story at a Glance:

Skin cancers are by far the most commonly diagnosed cancer in the United States, so to prevent them, the public is constantly told to avoid the sun. However, while the relatively benign skin cancers are caused by sun exposure, the ones responsible for most skin cancer deaths are due to a lack of sunlight.

This is unfortunate because sunlight is arguably the most important nutrient for the human body, as avoiding it doubles one’s rate of dying and significantly increases their risk of cancer.

item.title: Tanning beds and Vitamin D - many studies
item.description:
• Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009

Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009

Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki 


Markdown:
--------
{{< toc >}}

---

#### Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009

<img src="/attachments/d3.mock.jpg" alt="image" width="800">

 **[<i class="fas fa-file-pdf" style="margin-right: 0.3em;"></i>Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki ](/attachments/d3.mock.pdf)** 

AST Structure:
-------------
├── DivNode
│   full_match: `{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}`
│   inner_content: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: (class="lefth4")
│   │   class: lefth4
│   children:
│   ├── MakeTocNode
│   │   full_match: `{maketoc Title=""}`
│   │   inner_content: ``
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content:  Title=""
│   │   │   Title: ├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!~~#F00:26+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have TANNING in the title`
│   inner_content: `~~#F00:26+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have TANNING in the title`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── ColorNode
│   │   full_match: `~~#F00:26+~~`
│   │   inner_content: `26+`
│   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   raw_content: #F00
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: `26+`
│   │   │   inner_content: `26+`
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ` VitaminDWiki pages have TANNING in the title`
│   │   inner_content: ` VitaminDWiki pages have TANNING in the title`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── EmphasisNode
│   full_match: `''This list is automatically updated''`
│   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `This list is automatically updated`
│   │   inner_content: `This list is automatically updated`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ListNode
│   full_match: `{LIST()}\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="tanning"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n{LIST}`
│   inner_content: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="tanning"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: 
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="tanning"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`
│   │   inner_content: `\n{list max="150"}\n{filter field="title" content="tanning"}\n{filter type="wiki page"}\n{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}\n{OUTPUT(template="table")}\n{tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}\n{column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}\n{column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}\n{OUTPUT}\n{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}\n{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}\n`├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((UV and D)) category contains`
│   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki – ((UV and D)) category contains`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `VitaminDWiki – `
│   │   inner_content: `VitaminDWiki – `
│   ├── LocalLinkNode
│   │   full_match: `((UV and D))`
│   │   inner_content: `UV and D`
│   │   page: `UV and D`
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   full_match: `UV and D`
│   │   │   inner_content: `UV and D`
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ` category contains`
│   │   inner_content: ` category contains`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── IncludeNode
│   full_match: `{include page="UV and D" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"}`
│   inner_content: ``
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content:  page="UV and D" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"
│   │   page: UV and D
│   │   start: ~tc~ start ~/tc~
│   │   stop: ~tc~ end ~/tc~
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: ``
│   │   inner_content: ``├── HorizontalRuleNode
│   full_match: `\n---\n`
│   inner_content: `---`├── HeadingNode
│   full_match: `!!!!Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009`
│   inner_content: `Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009`
│   level: `4`
│   children:
│   ├── TextNode
│   │   full_match: `Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009`
│   │   inner_content: `Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009`├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── ImgNode
│   full_match: `{img type="attId" attId="21109" width="800"}`
│   inner_content: ``
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content:  type="attId" attId="21109" width="800"
│   │   type: attId
│   │   attId: 21109
│   │   width: 800├── TextNode
│   full_match: `\n`
│   inner_content: `\n`├── FontNode
│   full_match: `{FONT(size="17")}__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__{FONT}`
│   inner_content: `__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__`
│   attrs_dict:
│   │   raw_content: size="17"
│   │   size: 17
│   children:
│   ├── BoldNode
│   │   full_match: `__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__`
│   │   inner_content: `{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}`
│   │   children:
│   │   ├── AttachNode
│   │   │   full_match: `{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}`
│   │   │   inner_content: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `
│   │   │   attrs_dict:
│   │   │   │   raw_content: (inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")
│   │   │   │   inline: 1
│   │   │   │   id: 21108
│   │   │   │   icon: 1
│   │   │   children:
│   │   │   ├── TextNode
│   │   │   │   full_match: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `
│   │   │   │   inner_content: `Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki `

Original Tiki:
-------------
{DIV(class="lefth4")}{maketoc Title=""}{DIV}
---
!!!!~~#F00:26+~~ VitaminDWiki pages have TANNING in the title
''This list is automatically updated''
{LIST()}
{list max="150"}
{filter field="title" content="tanning"}
{filter type="wiki page"}
{sort mode="modification_date_major_desc"}
{OUTPUT(template="table")}
   {tableparams allowtableexpansion="n" shownbitems="y" title=""}
    {column sort="title" label="Title" field="title" mode="raw"}{column}
    {column label="Modified" sort="modification_date_major" field="modification_date_major"}
{OUTPUT}
{FORMAT(name="title")}{display name=title format="objectlink"}{FORMAT}
{FORMAT(name="modification_date_major")}{display name=modification_date_major format="date"}{FORMAT}
{LIST}
---
!!!!VitaminDWiki – ((UV and D)) category contains
{include page="UV and D" start="~tc~ start ~/tc~" stop="~tc~ end ~/tc~"}
---
!!!!Tanning bed use in Germany - 2009
{img type="attId" attId="21109" width="800"}
{FONT(size="17")}__{ATTACH(inline="1" id="21108" icon="1")}Download the PDF from VitaminDWiki {ATTACH}__{FONT}

item.title: Your body needs sunshine for health - even Australia agrees
item.description:
• Why your skin needs to see the sun WITHOUT sunscreen every day: Experts have radically changed their rules for UV exposure and the risk of skin cancer - this is how it affects you
      • Vitamin D from low-cost UVB lamps has the following update

Why your skin needs to see the sun WITHOUT sunscreen every day: Experts have radically changed their rules for UV exposure and the risk of skin cancer - this is how it affects you

By JINAN HARB FOR THE DAILY MAIL

item.title: Seniors get about 4X less vitamin D from the sun or UVB
item.description:
• Response by Perplexity AI - Feb 2024
      • Note: Probably little reduced response in seniors with Topical Vitamin D
      • 13 reasons why many seniors need more vitamin D (both dose and level) - July 2023 has:

Response by Perplexity AI - Feb 2024

Includes references, graphics, videos, etc.

Seniors synthesize less vitamin D from sun exposure due to several physiological and lifestyle factors. The primary reasons include:

item.title: Lack of Vitamin D due to lack of Sun, global perspective - Grant
item.description:
• Chapter 56 Determinants of Vitamin D Deficiency from Sun Exposure A Global Perspective - Jan 2024
      • VitaminDWiki – Noontime sun and D category contain

Chapter 56 Determinants of Vitamin D Deficiency from Sun Exposure A Global Perspective - Jan 2024

In book: Feldman and Pike’s Vitamin D, vol. 2, Disease and Therapeutics

William Burgess Grant, Pal Bhattoa Harjit, Pawel Pludowski

Vitamin D deficiency, generally defined as 25-hydroxyvitamin D (25(OH)D) concentration <50 nmol/L, affects nearly half the world’s population. Solar ultraviolet B (UVB) exposure is the primary source of vitamin D for most people. Many factors affect 25(OH)D concentrations related to solar UVB exposure, including skin pigmentation, solar zenith angle, atmospheric aerosols and clouds, time spent in the sun, amount of skin surface area exposed, use of sunscreen, age, and body mass index. Cultural and lifestyle differences-such as beauty standards, including high regard for fair skin in darker-skinned populations and avoidance of wrinkling; occupation; religion; urban/rural residence; and fear of developing skin cancer or melanoma-also affect some of those factors. Thus, fortification of food with vitamin D and vitamin D supplementation would have to be employed to compensate for unavoidable or inconvenient lack of solar UVB exposure.

item.title: Risk of Parkinson’s decreases with time in summer sun
item.description:
• Association of time spent outdoors with the risk of Parkinson’s disease: a prospective cohort study of 329,359 participants
      • VitaminDWiki - Overview Parkinson’s and Vitamin D contains :

Association of time spent outdoors with the risk of Parkinson’s disease: a prospective cohort study of 329,359 participants

BMC Neurol. 2024 Jan 2;24(1):10. doi: 10.1186/s12883-023-03499-7.

Ling Hu # 1, Yisen Shi # 2 3, Xinyang Zou 2 3, Zhaohui Lai 1, Fabin Lin 4, Guoen Cai 5, Xianghong Liu 6

item.title: 50 ng of Vitamin D - 100 hours of noon sunbathing OR 3 dollars of Vit D
item.description:
• Only 90 minutes of sun daily: if 7 factors are all good
      • VitaminDWiki – Is 50 ng of vitamin D too high, just right, or not enough

Only 90 minutes of sun daily: if 7 factors are all good

Young, white skin, lying down, in bathing suit, hot summer sun, around noon, not overweight     3X longer for each of the following: Obese, Elderly, Dark Skin     2X longer if standing up and wearing [iki-index.php?page_id=13990] and pants

item.title: Light improves health by more than just Vitamin D
item.description:
• Using Light (Sunlight, Blue Light & Red Light) to Optimize Health
      • See related in VitaminDWiki:

Using Light (Sunlight, Blue Light & Red Light) to Optimize Health

YouTube 160 minutes

Jump to portions of the video

  • 00:00:00 Using Light to Improve Health

  • 00:04:31 The Brain-Body Contract

  • 00:05:17 AG1 (Athletic Greens), Thesis, LMNT

  • 00:09:56 Physics of Light, Electromagnetic Energy

  • 00:12:23 Wavelengths of Light

  • 00:15:38 How Light Penetrates Tissues

  • 00:20:13 Light & the Body: Direct & Indirect Signals

item.title: Less vitamin D from the sun if it is too hot to be outside (now noticed in China)
item.description:
• Correlation between meteorological factors and vitamin D status under different season
      • See also VitaminDWiki

Correlation between meteorological factors and vitamin D status under different season

Sci Rep . 2023 Mar 23;13(1):4762. doi: 10.1038/s41598-023-31698-2.

Xichao Wang # 1 2, Ke Lu # 3, Junjie Shen 1 2, Shihan Xu 1 2, Qi Wang 1 2, Yaqin Gong 4, Yunyu Xia 5, Xiaochun Wang 5, Lin Chen 6, Shanjun Yan 6, Zaixiang Tang 7 8, Chong Li 9
